race.comment: VEXATIOUS ROSE (13) has impressed this campaign, just missing fresh before breaking her maiden last start on the main course here. Drawn wide again here, but she was impressive when winning last start and that form has already worked out well. Can repeat the dose. SANDFIRE ROSE (11) jumped a $10 chance last start on the main course here and stuck on well over 1400m. now out to the mile looks a good move third-up and she should get every chance from the inside draw. Tsang's claim means she carries no weight here and she can get back to winning ways. SISU SPIRIT (2) is third-up now and out to a more suitable distance. He was just fair last start, but the firmer footing here is a bonus and a much better performance is on the cards. SHOWLAS (1) has to be included after closing strongly last start at Belmont. PUBLICISE (7) won't be far away coming back in trip after tackling the Oaks last time out.
